The '''sand bat''' was an animal [[Homeworld|native]] to the [[desert]] [[planet]] of [[Tatooine]]. The [[Tusken Raider]]s used its [[Sand bat venom|venom]] as a weapon to [[Death|kill]] [[Krayt dragon]]s during rites of passage.<ref name="Rites" /> The bent end of a gaderffii, called the ''traang'' in [[Tusken]], could be doused with [[sand bat]] [[Sand bat venom|venom]], which had paralyzing properties.
